name: Duck Chess
description: After each of your moves, place your rubber duck on any empty square. The duck blocks all movement — no piece (yours or your opponent's) can enter that square. Reposition it each turn.

name: Manifestation
description: Your Queen leaps like a knight from move 1. The Amazon modifier is built-in and won't appear in your draft pool.

name: Inner Vision
description: Each draft phase you see 1 extra modifier choice that your opponent cannot see. Your drafts stay one step ahead.

name: Abundance
description: Start with 2 extra pawns on c3 and f3 (c6 and f6 for Black). A generous opening presence.

name: Dominion
description: Your King can move up to 2 squares in any direction (a leap — intermediate squares don't block). Authority knows no bounds.

name: Sacred Passage
description: Your Bishops slide through your own pieces diagonally. Dragon Bishop is built-in and removed from your draft pool.

name: The Pact
description: Once per game: swap any 2 of your own pieces (counts as your turn). The soul of sacrifice made whole.

name: Unstoppable
description: Your Rooks phase through your own pieces from move 1. Phantom Rook is built-in and removed from your draft pool.

name: Royal Strike
description: Once per game: your King makes a queen-range capture from wherever it stands. The sovereign strikes without moving.

name: Deeper Wells
description: All your draft choices are drawn from 1 tier higher than the current phase (Phase 1 → Rare, Phase 2 → Epic, etc.).

name: Fate's Hand
description: Each draft phase your choices come from a random tier between 1 and the current phase number. Chaos rewards the brave.

name: The Verdict
description: Once per game: mark one of your pieces Immune for 3 full turns. It cannot be captured by any means — standard or chaos.

name: Inversion
description: Your pawns can also move 1 square backwards or capture diagonally backwards. Upside-down perspective unlocks new paths — they cannot promote by moving backwards.

name: The Wake
description: Whenever you capture an enemy piece worth at least a knight, a pawn spawns on the square your piece moved FROM.

name: Rebalance
description: Once per draft phase: discard one of your modifier choices and draw 2 fresh replacements. Balance over randomness.

name: Bargain
description: Once per game: freeze one enemy piece for 2 full turns. It cannot move or use chaos abilities. The price is paid.

name: Collapse
description: Your Rooks gain 1-step diagonal movement from move 1. Dragon Rook is built-in and removed from your draft pool.

name: Guiding Light
description: All your Knights permanently gain Camel leaps (1,3 jumps) on top of their normal movement. Stars align.

name: Nocturnal Hunt
description: From Turn 10 (Phase 2): your Queen can capture any adjacent diagonal enemy without physically moving (queen stays, once per turn).

name: First Light
description: Once per game: every eligible pawn surges forward 1 free square (skips blocked pawns and pawns that would promote), then you still make your normal move.

name: Resurrection
description: Once per game: call back one captured piece — it returns to its original starting square (if that square is empty). The trumpet sounds.

name: Final Act
description: Once per game: after your opponent completes their move, take 1 free bonus move before your regular turn begins.
